name: Legal NDA
prompt_template: Generate a Non-Disclosure Agreement between {party_a} and {party_b}. The agreement should cover: confidential information scope, obligations of receiving party, term of {term} years, governing law of {jurisdiction}. Include standard carve-outs for publicly available information and prior knowledge. The agreement should be formal and legally precise.

name: Employment Agreement
prompt_template: Generate an employment agreement for a {job_title} position at {company_name}. Include: job responsibilities, compensation of {salary} per year, benefits, non-compete clause with {noncompete_radius} mile radius, intellectual property assignment, at-will employment clause, governing law of {jurisdiction}.

name: Privacy Notice (GDPR)
prompt_template: Generate a GDPR-compliant privacy notice for {organization_name}. Cover: data controller identity, types of personal data collected ({data_types}), legal basis for processing, data subject rights (access, rectification, erasure, portability), international transfers, retention periods, contact information for DPO.

name: Legal Case Summary
prompt_template: Generate a legal case summary for a {case_type} matter. Include: case caption, procedural history, key facts, legal issues presented, holding, reasoning, and practical implications. The summary should be written for a {audience} audience.

name: Master Services Agreement
prompt_template: Generate a Master Services Agreement between {client_name} and {vendor_name} for {service_description}. Include: statement of work process, payment terms of Net {payment_days}, IP ownership, indemnification, limitation of liability at {liability_cap}, SLA commitments, termination provisions.

name: Clinical Progress Note
prompt_template: Generate a clinical progress note for a {specialty} patient visit. Include SOAP format: Subjective (chief complaint: {chief_complaint}), Objective (vitals, exam findings), Assessment ({diagnoses}), Plan (medications: {medications}, follow-up in {followup_period}). Note should comply with HIPAA and avoid identifying information.

name: Hospital Discharge Summary
prompt_template: Generate a hospital discharge summary for a patient admitted for {admission_diagnosis}. Include: admission date, discharge date, principal diagnosis, procedures performed ({procedures}), discharge medications, discharge instructions, follow-up appointments, and attending physician attestation.

name: Laboratory Report
prompt_template: Generate a laboratory report for {test_panel} testing. Include: specimen type, collection date/time, reference ranges, result values, abnormal flags, interpretation by {lab_director_title}, QC indicators, and ordering provider information.

name: Radiology Report
prompt_template: Generate a radiology report for a {modality} study of the {anatomy}. Include: clinical indication, technique, comparison studies, findings (systematic review of all structures), impression with key findings, and recommendations. Written at {complexity} complexity level.

name: Earnings Call Transcript
prompt_template: Generate an earnings call transcript for {company_name} Q{quarter} {year} results. Include: opening remarks by CEO ({ceo_name}), CFO financial review (revenue: {revenue}, EPS: {eps}, guidance: {guidance}), analyst Q&A section with {num_analysts} analysts, and closing remarks. Use realistic financial language.

name: Loan Application
prompt_template: Generate a commercial loan application for {applicant_entity} requesting {loan_amount} for {loan_purpose}. Include: business description, financial statements summary (revenue: {annual_revenue}, EBITDA: {ebitda}), collateral description, management team, use of proceeds, repayment source, and certifications.

name: Compliance Report (SOX)
prompt_template: Generate a SOX Section 404 internal controls assessment report for {company_name} for fiscal year {fiscal_year}. Include: management's assessment of ICFR effectiveness, material weaknesses identified ({material_weaknesses}), remediation plans, auditor attestation reference, and COSO framework alignment.

name: SEC 10-K Risk Factors
prompt_template: Generate SEC 10-K Item 1A Risk Factors for {company_name} in the {industry} industry. Include {num_risk_factors} material risk factors covering: business risks, financial risks, regulatory risks, technology risks, and macro-economic risks. Each risk factor should have a title and detailed explanation.

name: Investment Research Report
prompt_template: Generate an equity research report for {ticker_symbol} ({company_name}). Include: executive summary, investment thesis, industry analysis, financial model summary (DCF target: {price_target}), risk factors, ESG considerations, and rating ({rating}: Buy/Hold/Sell) with 12-month price target.

name: AML Suspicious Activity Report
prompt_template: Generate a Bank Secrecy Act Suspicious Activity Report (SAR) narrative for suspicious {activity_type} activity. Include: subject description, account activity summary over {time_period}, why activity is suspicious, any prior contact with law enforcement, and filing institution attestation. Do not include real identifying information.
